package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryTypeOutsideRepositoryPackage() string {
    ruleID := "repository_type_outside_repository_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repository implementations declared outside `repository`, `repo`, or `store` packages when the repo already uses those roles elsewhere."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
